package com.example.appserver.cache;

import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;
import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.*;

import java.util.List;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.mockito.Mockito;

import com.example.servercommon.model.SettingModel;
import com.example.servercommon.repository.SettingRepository;

class SettingVariableCacheTest {

    private SettingRepository settingRepository;
    private SettingVariableCache settingVariableCache;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        // モック化
        settingRepository = Mockito.mock(SettingRepository.class);
        // spy化して親クラス GenericCache のメソッド呼び出しを確認
        settingVariableCache = Mockito.spy(new SettingVariableCache(settingRepository));
    }

    @Test
    void testUpdateCache_shouldReloadCacheWithDataFromRepository() {
        // 準備
        List<SettingModel> mockList = List.of(new SettingModel());
        when(settingRepository.findAll()).thenReturn(mockList);

        // 実行
        settingVariableCache.updateCache();

        // 検証
        verify(settingRepository).findAll();
        verify(settingVariableCache).reloadCache("settingVariable", mockList);
    }

    @Test
    void testGetCache_shouldReturnCachedSettingVariables() {
        // 準備
        List<SettingModel> mockList = List.of(new SettingModel());
        doReturn(mockList).when(settingVariableCache).getCache("settingVariable");

        // 実行
        List<SettingModel> result = settingVariableCache.getCache();

        // 検証
        verify(settingVariableCache).getCache("settingVariable");
        assertEquals(mockList, result);
    }
}
